texto: The FHA's success provides strong evidence that government can and should play a role in the nation's mortgage finance system. It also demonstrates that although government intervention in the economy during the Great Recession was messy, things would have been a lot messier without it.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Mark Zandi sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. A afirmação “The FHA's success provides strong evidence that government can and should play a role in the nati…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sucesso, success, great, útil em momentos de great e strong.

texto: In the fourth grade, my history teacher gave us a project: Why was the auto industry located in Detroit, Michigan? I didn't know I was going to be an economist, but I knew I was going to do something that was involved in answering questions like that one because I thought that was a fascinating question.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mark Zandi: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a educacao. O trecho “In the fourth grade, my history teacher gave us a project: Why was the auto industry located in D…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, history, thought pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de thought e questions.

texto: Potential home buyers have a two-step decision process. First, they determine whether they can afford to make a purchase - does their income safely cover their mortgage payment? Then they determine whether owning is a better financial choice than renting - are the costs of owning a home lower than the cost of renting it?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Mark Zandi que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Potential home buyers have a two-step decision process. First, they determine whether they can af…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, decision, choice, com foco em choice e financial.
